overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a foggy futuristic city. The player character moves from an outdoor sidewalk lined with neon signs into a covered corridor with dynamic color-changing neon ceiling lights, then exits into an open plaza beneath a highway overpass with palm trees and atmospheric fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban sidewalk with orange benches and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy sidewalk past orange benches and illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person sitting on orange bench looking at a device

entered.detail: bright orange modern benches lining the left side of the walkway
tall modern concrete building facade with reflective surfaces
various illuminated neon signs and billboards on the left building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a foggy nighttime sidewalk flanked by orange benches on the left and a massive concrete building on the right. Neon signs illuminate the misty atmosphere while a few pedestrians move through the scene, including someone seated on a bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with color-changing neon ceiling grid and large advertisements

events.description: enters covered corridor with grid of neon ceiling lights
ceiling neon lights shift colors from purple to green to red

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor beneath the color-shifting neon ceiling grid

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing near the left wall

entered.detail: grid of fluorescent neon tubes on the ceiling cycling through purple, cyan, and red colors
large wall advertisement for Solasil Machistador with colorful graphics
large wall advertisement showing a woman with a drink and MIX IT UP text
row of illuminated vending machines near the corridor exit

segments.scene_description: Inside a covered corridor illuminated by a grid of neon ceiling lights that dynamically shift between purple, green, and red hues. Large advertisement screens line both walls while two people stand conversing on the left side near the exit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open foggy plaza beneath highway overpass with palm trees and street lighting

events.description: exits covered corridor into open foggy plaza under massive concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the desolate open plaza beneath the overpass, navigating around palm trees and concrete structures in the heavy fog

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure overhead with support pillars
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy background
ground-level street lamps creating glowing orbs in the fog
asphalt road with lane markings visible under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor into a vast open plaza beneath a massive concrete overpass. Tall palm trees and ground-level street lights pierce through the heavy fog, creating a moody, desolate atmosphere. The camera continues forward toward a road visible in the misty distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit foggy sidewalk through a vibrant corridor and into a desolate open plaza. It begins by moving along a misty nighttime street flanked by orange benches and a massive concrete building, where neon signs cast a glow over a few scattered pedestrians. As the camera enters a covered corridor, the atmosphere shifts into a rhythmic display of purple, green, and red neon ceiling lights that reflect off large advertisement screens lining the walls. The scene then opens as the camera passes two conversing figures and emerges from the doorway into a vast plaza beneath a towering concrete overpass. Finally, the view pushes forward through heavy fog and past tall palm trees toward a distant, misty road.
